evidence.today_log_tail:
# 2026-03-02 - Monday

## Dad Joke Video Pipeline Progress

### Fixes Completed
- **Font**: Changed from Fredoka One → Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif (Fredoka not installed on system)
- **brand.ts**: Added fontSizes (setup: 48px, punchline: 56px)
- **SegmentText.tsx**: Updated to use BRAND.fontSizes and fontWeight
- **Text positioning**: Adjusted for 720x1280 canvas (setup y: 35%, punchline y: 55%)
- **SD polling script**: Updated max time to 2 min, size threshold to 50000 bytes

### Test Video #6
- Joke: "I'm so good at winking, I can wink both my eyes at the same time."
- File: dadjoke-1772490125700.mp4 (240KB, 720x1280, 5.03s)
- Generated with v3 script (multi-segment support)
- Preview published: https://verdant-quartz-gngc.here.now/

### SD Timeout Issue (BLOCKING)
- Windows SD at 192.168.1.33:7860 taking 6-10 minutes per image
- Expected: ~90 seconds
- Currently: Falls back to gradient after 2 min timeout
- Possible fixes:
  - Reduce resolution (540x960 instead of 720x1280)
  - Lower steps (15 instead of 20-25)
  - Change sampler to Euler a (faster)
  - Check GPU utilization on Windows machine

### Code Locations
- Main script: /home/kevin/.openclaw/workspace/dadtasticdads-remotion/scripts/generate-dadjoke-video-v3.js
- Remotion project: /home/kevin/.openclaw/workspace/dadtasticdads-remotion/
- Output: /home/kevin/.openclaw/workspace/dadtasticdads-output/
- Google Sheets ID: 1cXSGjCXleUK8iQweBAwLaa7j3QK2Sla-8v11CirQsuw (Dadabase)

### Workflow
1. Fetch joke from Google Sheets (gog skill)
2. Detect format via Mistral 7B (segments with timing)
3. Generate audio via ElevenLabs (George voice)
4. Generate image via SD (or fallback gradient)
5. Render video via Remotion
6. Upload to here.now (HTML + video.mp4 together)

# 2026-03-02 - Monday

## Dad Joke Video Pipeline Progress

### Fixes Completed
- **Font**: Changed from Fredoka One → Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif (Fredoka not installed on system)
- **brand.ts**: Added fontSizes (setup: 48px, punchline: 56px)
- **SegmentText.tsx**: Updated to use BRAND.fontSizes and fontWeight
- **Text positioning**: Adjusted for 720x1280 canvas (setup y: 35%, punchline y: 55%)
- **SD polling script**: Updated max time to 2 min, size threshold to 50000 bytes

### Test Video #6
- Joke: "I'm so good at winking, I can wink both my eyes at the same time."
- File: dadjoke-1772490125700.mp4 (240KB, 720x1280, 5.03s)
- Generated with v3 script (multi-segment support)
- Preview published: https://verdant-quartz-gngc.here.now/

### SD Timeout Issue (BLOCKING)
- Windows SD at 192.168.1.33:7860 taking 6-10 minutes per image
- Expected: ~90 seconds
- Currently: Falls back to gradient after 2 min timeout
- Possible fixes:
  - Reduce resolution (540x960 instead of 720x1280)
  - Lower steps (15 instead of 20-25)
  - Change sampler to Euler a (faster)
  - Check GPU utilization on Windows machine

### Code Locations
- Main script: /home/kevin/.openclaw/workspace/dadtasticdads-remotion/scripts/generate-dadjoke-video-v3.js
- Remotion project: /home/kevin/.openclaw/workspace/dadtasticdads-remotion/
- Output: /home/kevin/.openclaw/workspace/dadtasticdads-output/
- Google Sheets ID: 1cXSGjCXleUK8iQweBAwLaa7j3QK2Sla-8v11CirQsuw (Dadabase)

### Workflow
1. Fetch joke from Google Sheets (gog skill)
2. Detect format via Mistral 7B (segments with timing)
3. Generate audio via ElevenLabs (George voice)
4. Generate image via SD (or fallback gradient)
5. Render video via Remotion
6. Upload to here.now (HTML + video.mp4 together)
